Constructor for xsl_model S3 class

Source: R/xslFit-class.R, R/xslMod-class.R
xslMod-class.Rd

Constructor for xsl_model S3 class

xslMod S3 class

Constructor for xslMod S3 class

Usage

new_xslFit(x = list())

xslMod(
  name = character(),
  description = character(),
  model,
  params = numeric(),
  stochastic = logical()
)

new_xslMod(x = list())

Arguments

x

List with elements perf, matrix, traj, sse

name

Name

description

Description

model

Model fitting function

params

List of parameters

stochastic

Logical indicating whether model is stochastic

Value

An object of class xslMod

On this page
